## Investigation

One active bug. Clear when resolved.

### Symptom

Observable behavior vs expected.

### Reproduction

Repeatable steps, environment, and inputs.

### Root cause

Named cause with file:line or mechanism — before any fix.

### Minimal fix

Smallest change that addresses the root cause only.

### Regression risk

Adjacent paths or behavior that could break; what to re-check.

### Verification

Steps to confirm the fix; add or update a regression test when practical.

## P0 — Critical

- [ ] **Issue title** — description

## P1 — High

- [ ] **Issue title** — description

## P2 — Medium

- [ ] **Issue title** — description

## P3 — Low

- [ ] **Issue title** — description
